description_long: This object is a corner section of a stone barrier, constructed from irregularly shaped, rough-hewn stones of varying sizes and colors, predominantly tan, brown, and ochre. The stones are mortared together, forming a sturdy, L-shaped structure with a right-angle joint. The top edge is capped with a smooth, light-colored material, likely concrete or stone, providing a finished appearance and additional durability. The surface of the stones shows natural texture, with some stones bearing visible tool marks and minor weathering. One face of the block features engraved markings or inscriptions, adding a historical or decorative element. The overall construction suggests it is designed to serve as a robust obstacle or boundary in an urban or landscaped environment.
description: A robust, L-shaped stone barrier made of mortared, rough-hewn stones with a smooth, light-colored cap and visible engravings on one face.
description_view_0: This view highlights the lighter, tan stones and the engraved markings on the right face, as well as the clean, capped top edge.
description_view_1: This angle shows the darker, more weathered stones on the left face and the continuation of the cap, with less visible engraving.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the rough, dark stonework and the depth of the L-shaped structure, with minimal visible detail on the cap.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the interior corner, showing the junction of both stone faces and the contrast between lighter and darker stones.
attribute_location_context: historic or decorative urban wall or boundary in a city park or plaza
attribute_installation_method: mortared in place on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: Some stones show minor surface erosion and discoloration, with slight chipping on edges and corners.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Visible engravings or inscriptions are present on one of the lighter stone faces.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: forms part of a continuous wall or boundary structure
